TMAP.name: TMAP v2 multi-agent coding pipeline
steps: critique loop if validation fails or HIGH issue
TMAP.persistence: onSessionStart/onAgentCall/onSessionEnd hooks → tmap_sessions/tmap_agent_logs/tmap_costs (server provides; CLI omits)
TMAP.resilience: every LLM call goes through chatWithDARS

Titan.name: Titan Mode — AI System Architect (Think First, Build Later)
Titan.webMode: CodeMode 'titan' (gated); UI in components/code/titan-workflow.tsx + titan-stepper.tsx; client logic lib/titan.ts + store/code-store.ts; constants TITAN_PHASES
steps: Confidence Check (<85% asks more; minConfidence default 85, enforced in code)
Titan.note: Titan is NOT a product — highest MODE inside Coagentix Code only

DARS.name: Dynamic Adaptive Resilience System (provider failover)
DARS.flow: listProviderCandidates(role) → pickHealthy(HealthStore) → chat() → on error classifyError → failover to next candidate (MAX_FAILOVER=4, backoff) → log AgentLogEntry; mock mode if no keys

WebChat.name: aof-web streaming chat
WebChat.flow: route classify (lib/router.ts) → optional web search (search/manager) → pick agent persona (lib/raa) → provider chain Anthropic→OpenRouter with per-model failover → SSE frames (text + control: failover/model/sources) → client streamChat (lib/api.ts) → chat-store
WebChat.offline: lib/mock.ts streamText/mockChat/mockCodeRun fallback when no backend/keys

AuthFlows.web: Supabase Auth (Google OAuth) → app/auth/callback → middleware.ts → auth-provider/auth-gate; admin via lib/admin
